about.metaDesc: Pultap.az - Azerbaijan's largest credit, deposit, and financial comparison platform.
about.title: About Us

hero.title: Your Trusted Guide in Financial Decisions
hero.desc: Pultap.az is Azerbaijan's most advanced and comprehensive financial products comparison platform. We help users make the right decisions by easily comparing offers from banks and non-bank credit organizations.

description.intro: Our goal is to make financial services accessible, transparent, and understandable for everyone.
description.servicesIntro: On our platform, users can easily find the most advantageous options for the following services:

servicesList.cash: Cash loans – interest rates and terms offered by various banks,
servicesList.mortgage: Mortgage loans – state and internal mortgage programs,
servicesList.nbfc: NBCO loans – opportunities offered by non-bank credit organizations,
servicesList.cards: Bank cards – offers for debit and credit cards,
servicesList.deposits: Deposits – profitable deposit terms in AZN and foreign currencies,
servicesList.exchange: Exchange rates – constantly updated bank rates and currency converter.

description.applyOnline: Through our site, you can directly apply online to the bank's system for the credit or card product you choose, saving your time and money.
description.calculators: Also, through the comprehensive credit and deposit calculators on our platform, you can accurately calculate your future payments and earnings.
description.blog: As the Pultap.az team, we attach special importance to increasing financial literacy and regularly publish useful articles and market news.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To empower our users to make the best financial decisions by providing them with unbiased, accurate, and up-to-date information.

values.title: Our Values
values.description: Transparency, user-centricity, innovation, and security form the basis of our activities.

team.title: Pultap.az Team
team.desc: The professional and experienced team behind the project.

terms.metaDesc: Terms of use for the Pultap.az platform.
terms.title: Terms of Use

content.p2: 1.1 Pultap.az is an online platform for information and comparison purposes. We are not a bank or NBCO, we do not provide loans or deposits.
content.p3: 1.2 All financial data (rates, commissions, terms) placed on the platform is for informational purposes only. Actual terms may vary depending on the banks' policies.
content.p5: 2.1 The site administration does not guarantee the absolute accuracy and relevance of the information posted on the platform.
content.p6: 2.2 Pultap.az is not responsible for any contract, credit obligation, or financial loss concluded between the user and a financial institution.
content.p8: 3.1 The design, logo, graphic elements, and database of the site are protected by copyright. Unauthorized copying or use is prohibited.
content.p10: 4.1 Your personal information is used only with your permission and for the purpose of providing relevant services.
content.p11: 4.2 Pultap.az does not sell user information to third parties and does not share it except as provided by law.
content.p13: 5.1 The site administration reserves the right to suspend or modify the platform's operation at any time and without prior notice.
content.p15: 6.1 These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Azerbaijan.
content.p16: 6.2 Any disputes that may arise shall be resolved in the courts of the Republic of Azerbaijan.
content.p18: 7.1 If you have any questions regarding the terms of use, you can contact us at info@pultap.az.

terms.desc: Rules and legal terms for using the platform.
terms.c1_desc:
1.1 Pultap.az is an online platform for informational and comparison purposes. We are not a bank or NBCO, and do not provide loans or deposits.

1.2 All financial information on the platform is for informational purposes only. Actual terms may vary based on bank policies.
terms.c2_desc:
2.1 The site administration does not guarantee the absolute accuracy and relevance of the information posted on the platform.

2.2 Pultap.az is not responsible for any agreement, loan obligation, or financial loss incurred between the user and a financial institution.
terms.c3_desc: 3.1 The site's design, logo, graphic elements, and database are protected by copyright. Unauthorized copying or use is prohibited.

content.p2: Cookies are small text files downloaded to your browser or device when you visit our website. They help the site function properly, remember your preferences, and improve your user experience.
content.p3: What types of cookies do we use?
content.p4: 1. Essential Cookies: Crucial for the basic functions of the website (e.g., security, network management). Disabling these may cause some parts of the site to not function properly.
content.p5: 2. Analytics and Performance Cookies: Used to understand how our site is used and to improve performance (e.g., Google Analytics).
content.p6: 3. Functional Cookies: Used to remember your personal preferences, such as language choice or region.
content.p7: 4. Marketing and Advertising Cookies: Used to show you more relevant advertisements and measure the effectiveness of our advertising campaigns.
content.p9: Most web browsers automatically accept cookies, but you can block or delete them by changing your browser settings. Please note that blocking cookies may prevent you from fully using some features of our site.

cookieConsent.title: Cookie Notice
cookieConsent.description: Our site uses cookies to provide a better user experience. By accepting cookies, you agree to our Cookie Policy.
